summary: Zero-Friction Entry (P1) testing complete. All 13 features verified via Playwright. Frontend: 100% pass rate. Unauthenticated users can access /app/story-video-studio directly, fill all form fields, and when clicking Generate, a friendly login gate appears (not an error). State is saved to localStorage and restored after login. Dashboard Continue Story buttons work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Zero-friction entry correctly implemented: /app/story-video-studio is NOT auth-gated (App.js line 221)
Login gate shows friendly invitation: 'Log in to generate your story' heading, 'Your story is saved' subtitle, Log In/Sign Up buttons, '50 free credits on signup'
Generate button correctly hidden when login gate is shown
localStorage correctly saves studio_saved_state with all form fields (title, storyText, animStyle, ageGroup, voicePreset, timestamp)
State restoration works: after login, user is redirected back to studio with all form fields pre-filled
Welcome overlay appears after state restoration: 'Let's turn your story into a cinematic video'
Dashboard Continue Story buttons correctly save remix_data to localStorage with prompt, source_tool, and remixFrom data
Remix banner appears in studio when continuing a story: 'Remixing: [title] — edit the story and make it your own!'
P0.5 regression check passed: No '0 today', '0 continued', or '0 continuations' text on dashboard
context_for_next_testing_agent: Zero-Friction Entry (P1) testing complete. All features verified: (1) Unauthenticated user can access /app/story-video-studio without redirect. (2) Studio loads with full form (title, story text, animation style grid, target age, narrator voice). (3) Unauthenticated user can fill all form fields. (4) When clicking Generate, login gate appears with correct content. (5) Login gate is friendly invitation, NOT red error. (6) Generate button hidden when login gate shown. (7) localStorage saves studio_saved_state and remix_return_url. (8) Dashboard Continue Story buttons save remix_data to localStorage. (9) After login, state is restored from localStorage. (10) Welcome overlay appears after restoration. (11) Remix banner appears when continuing a story. (12) P0.5 regression: No zeros displayed on dashboard.

Feature_1_Unauthenticated_Access.details: Unauthenticated user can navigate directly to /app/story-video-studio without being redirected to login

Feature_2_Studio_Form_Elements.details: Studio loads with full form: title input, story textarea, 6 animation styles, 5 age groups, 5 voice presets, generate button

Feature_3_Form_Fill_Unauthenticated.details: Unauthenticated user can fill in title, story text, select animation style, age group, and voice preset

Feature_4_Login_Gate_Appears.details: When unauthenticated user clicks Generate Video, login gate appears with data-testid='login-gate'

Feature_5_Login_Gate_Content.details: Login gate shows: 'Log in to generate your story' heading, 'Your story is saved. Create a free account to bring it to life.' subtitle, Log In button, Sign Up Free button, '50 free credits on signup'

Feature_6_No_Error_Text.details: Login gate does NOT show red error text - it's a friendly invitation

Feature_7_Generate_Button_Hidden.details: Generate button is not in DOM when login gate is shown

Feature_8_LocalStorage_State_Saved.details: localStorage has 'studio_saved_state' key with title, storyText, animStyle, ageGroup, voicePreset, timestamp

Feature_10_Dashboard_Continue_Story.details: Dashboard hero 'Continue This Story' button saves remix_data to localStorage with prompt, source_tool='dashboard-continue', remixFrom.parent_video_id, remixFrom.title

Feature_11_State_Restoration.details: After login redirect back to studio, saved state (title, story text, animation style) is restored from localStorage. Welcome overlay appears confirming restoration.

Feature_12_Remix_Banner.details: When continuing a story from dashboard, remix banner appears: 'Remixing: [title] — edit the story and make it your own!'

Feature_13_P05_Regression.details: No '0 today', '0 continued', or '0 continuations' text on dashboard. Live stats show '59 stories created', 'Fresh stories waiting', 'Be the first to continue'

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. 401 errors for unauthenticated API calls are expected and handled correctly by showing login gate.
